search_input.ranking_objective: maximize recent_outer_risk_change capture, minimize non-target false positives, and keep stable low-mileage drivers favorable

threshold_candidates.rationale: care threshold is generated from the synthetic 30-customer risk-change score distribution; tier thresholds come from FINAL_PRODUCT_DIRECTION.md#10 S/A/B/C bands

metadata.source: Policy Search Agent structured candidate grid
metadata.rationale: ranked by synthetic 30-customer capture, false-positive, and stability metrics

strengths: captures at least four of five recent outer risk-change customers
keeps stable local low-mileage customers out of preventive care
keeps non-target preventive-care false positives within the gate
tradeoffs: 1 non-target customers are still routed to preventive care
fairness_notes: stable_outer_safe drivers are evaluated by risk-change deltas, not outer-zone exposure alone
stable low-mileage drivers are protected from preventive-care false positives
